name: tableau-sql-updater
description: Edit and validate Tableau datasource Custom SQL / Initial SQL without Tableau Desktop.

tableau_site_id.title: Tableau site
tableau_site_id.description: Default Tableau site content URL (e.g. cars or dealertools)

tableau_token_name.title: Tableau PAT name
tableau_token_name.description: Tableau Personal Access Token name (Tableau Online → My Account Settings → Personal Access Tokens)

redshift_user.title: Redshift username
redshift_user.description: Redshift username embedded into the .tdsx for connection auth

redshift_password.title: Redshift password
redshift_password.description: Redshift password embedded into the .tdsx for connection auth
